git_commit_info.message:
Refactor inter test events (#264)

* Move inter-test-event function definition into their own file

* Remove file-edit inter-test-event callback arg to decouple from saver outage

* Add file-edit inter-test-event calls at start of all remaining ui widgets

* Rename cd.fileEditITE() to cd.saveAnyFileChangesITE() and make synchronous
git_commit_info.author: Jon Jagger <jon@kosli.com>
